<style>/* =========================================================
   A FÓRMULA — Site Institucional v3 (premium polish)
   Mesma estrutura da v2 · imagens reais + refino de design
   ========================================================= */

/* ---------- Fonts ---------- */
@font-face{font-family:"Avenir";src:url("/index_assets/a14.woff2") format("woff2");font-weight:300;font-style:normal;font-display:swap}
@font-face{font-family:"Avenir";src:url("/index_assets/a15.woff2") format("woff2");font-weight:400;font-style:normal;font-display:swap}
@font-face{font-family:"Avenir";src:url("/index_assets/a16.woff2") format("woff2");font-weight:500;font-style:normal;font-display:swap}
/* avenir-heavy 700 removido: glifo "e" quebra em corpos pequenos; 700 sintetiza negrito do medium */
/* avenir-heavy 800 removido: idem; 800 sintetiza negrito do medium */

/* ---------- Tokens ---------- */
:root{
  --teal-900:#063237; --teal-850:#06343a; --teal-800:#0a3f45;
  --teal-700:#003b4a; --teal-650:#00424b; --teal-600:#004d54;
  --teal-500:#005b60; --teal-450:#00525d; --teal-400:#00606d; --teal-350:#007074;
  /* paleta da marca: primaria #008896 . escuro #063237 . cinza identidade #eef2f2 */
  --dark:#063237;
  --brand:#008896; --brand-deep:#04676f; --brand-tint:#6fc3cb;
  --accent:#008896; --accent-bright:#4fb6c0;
  --ink:#16282b; --muted:#51686c; --line:#e2e8e9;
  --white:#ffffff; --cream:#f5f8f8; --paper:#f5f8f8;
  --success:#2f8f6b; --warning:#b8842b; --error:#c0492f; --info:#008896;

  --serif:"Playfair Display",Georgia,serif;
  --sans:"Avenir","Segoe UI",system-ui,-apple-system,sans-serif;

  --container:1240px;
  --pad:clamp(20px,5vw,64px);
  --radius:18px; --radius-lg:26px;
  --sy:clamp(44px,5.5vw,84px); --sy-sm:clamp(36px,4.5vw,64px);
  /* elevation scale — refinada (sombras teal, mais suaves e em camadas) */
  --shadow-sm:0 2px 6px rgba(0,40,48,.05),0 8px 22px rgba(0,40,48,.06);
  --shadow:0 6px 16px rgba(0,40,48,.07),0 22px 54px rgba(0,40,48,.12);
  --shadow-lg:0 10px 28px rgba(0,40,48,.1),0 34px 80px rgba(0,40,48,.16);
  --hair:1px solid rgba(0,72,84,.08);
  --ease:cubic-bezier(.22,.61,.36,1);
  --ease-out:cubic-bezier(.16,1,.3,1);
  --ease-spring:cubic-bezier(.34,1.4,.5,1);
}

/* ---------- Reset ---------- */
*,*::before,*::after{box-sizing:border-box}
html{scroll-behavior:smooth;-webkit-text-size-adjust:100%;scroll-padding-top:84px;overflow-x:clip}
body{margin:0;font-family:var(--sans);font-weight:400;color:var(--ink);
  background:var(--white);line-height:1.6;overflow-x:hidden;-webkit-font-smoothing:antialiased;-moz-osx-font-smoothing:grayscale;text-rendering:optimizeLegibility}
::selection{background:var(--brand);color:#fff}
p{text-wrap:pretty}
img{display:block;max-width:100%;height:auto}
a{color:inherit;text-decoration:none}
button{font-family:inherit;cursor:pointer;border:none;background:none}
/* a11y — anel de foco visível e consistente (só teclado) */
:focus-visible{outline:3px solid var(--accent-bright);outline-offset:3px;border-radius:6px}
.hero :focus-visible,.news :focus-visible,.footer :focus-visible{outline-color:#fff}
h1,h2,h3,h4,p{margin:0}
ol,ul{margin:0;padding:0;list-style:none}
.container{width:100%;max-width:var(--container);margin:0 auto;padding:0 var(--pad)}

/* ---------- Buttons ---------- */
.btn{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;gap:.5em;
  font-weight:700;border-radius:999px;transition:transform .28s var(--ease),box-shadow .28s var(--ease),background .25s,color .25s;
  white-space:nowrap;text-align:center}
.btn:hover{transform:translateY(-2px)}
.btn:active{transform:translateY(0) scale(.985);transition-duration:.08s}
.btn--light{background:var(--white);color:var(--teal-800);padding:14px 30px;font-size:15px;box-shadow:var(--shadow-sm)}
.btn--light:hover{box-shadow:var(--shadow)}
.btn--solid{background:var(--brand);color:var(--dark);padding:16px 34px;font-size:14px;letter-spacing:.04em}
.btn--solid:hover{background:var(--brand-deep);color:#fff}
.btn--outline{background:transparent;color:var(--teal-600);border:1.5px solid var(--teal-600);padding:14.5px 32px;font-size:14px;letter-spacing:.04em}
.btn--outline:hover{background:var(--teal-600);color:#fff}
.btn--mint{background:var(--brand);color:var(--dark);padding:16px 36px;font-size:14px;letter-spacing:.04em;box-shadow:0 12px 28px rgba(0,171,191,.34)}
.btn--mint:hover{background:var(--brand-deep);color:#fff}
.btn--ghost-teal{background:transparent;color:var(--brand);font-weight:700;font-size:15px;padding:6px 0;letter-spacing:.03em}
.btn--ghost-teal:hover{color:var(--brand-deep)}

/* ---------- Reveal animation ---------- */
.reveal{opacity:0;transform:translateY(32px);transition:opacity .85s var(--ease-out),transform .85s var(--ease-out)}
.reveal.is-in{opacity:1;transform:none}
.empresas__grid .reveal:nth-child(2),.dif__grid .reveal:nth-child(2){transition-delay:.08s}
.empresas__grid .reveal:nth-child(3),.dif__grid .reveal:nth-child(3){transition-delay:.16s}
.empresas__grid .reveal:nth-child(4),.dif__grid .reveal:nth-child(4){transition-delay:.24s}
.dif__grid .reveal:nth-child(5){transition-delay:.1s}
.dif__grid .reveal:nth-child(6){transition-delay:.17s}
.dif__grid .reveal:nth-child(7){transition-delay:.24s}
.dif__grid .reveal:nth-child(8){transition-delay:.12s}
.dif__grid .reveal:nth-child(9){transition-delay:.19s}
@media (prefers-reduced-motion:reduce){.reveal{opacity:1;transform:none;transition:none}}
.reveal--left{transform:translateX(-46px)}
.reveal--right{transform:translateX(46px)}
.reveal--scale{transform:scale(.93)}
.reveal--left.is-in,.reveal--right.is-in,.reveal--scale.is-in{transform:none}
/* parallax: imagem do bloco "37 anos" e arte decorativa da newsletter */
.anos .anos__img{height:118%}
.anos__img,.news__media{will-change:transform}
@media (prefers-reduced-motion:reduce){.anos .anos__img,.news__media{transform:none!important;height:100%}}

/* shared display headings */
.display{font-weight:800;line-height:1.02;letter-spacing:-.02em}
.display--teal{color:var(--teal-600)}
.display--center{text-align:center;color:#08191d;font-weight:400;letter-spacing:-.03em;text-wrap:balance}
.display__hl{color:var(--brand);font-weight:600;display:block}
.eyebrow-thin{font-weight:300;letter-spacing:.02em;color:var(--ink)}
.accent{font-family:var(--serif);font-style:italic;font-weight:500}
.accent--teal{color:var(--teal-350)}

/* =========================================================
   PÁGINA INTERNA — hero + breadcrumb
   ========================================================= */
.page-hero{position:relative;overflow:hidden;color:#fff;
  background:linear-gradient(120deg,#063237,var(--dark) 52%,#0a6b75);
  padding:calc(72px + clamp(46px,8vw,92px)) 0 clamp(54px,8vw,92px)}
.page-hero::after{content:"";position:absolute;right:-6%;top:-30%;width:60%;height:160%;z-index:0;pointer-events:none;
  background:radial-gradient(closest-side,rgba(95,210,221,.16),transparent 70%)}
.page-hero__inner{position:relative;z-index:1;max-width:760px}
.crumb{display:flex;gap:10px;align-items:center;font-size:13px;letter-spacing:.04em;color:rgba(255,255,255,.68);margin-bottom:24px}
.crumb a{color:var(--accent-bright)}
.crumb a:hover{text-decoration:underline}
.crumb span[aria-current]{color:#fff}
.page-hero__title{font-weight:400;font-size:clamp(44px,8vw,84px);line-height:.98;letter-spacing:-.035em;text-wrap:balance}
.page-hero__title .accent{color:var(--accent-bright)}
.page-hero__lead{font-size:clamp(16px,2.4vw,21px);line-height:1.6;color:rgba(255,255,255,.9);margin-top:24px;max-width:540px}

/* =========================================================
   HEADER
   ========================================================= */
/* header solido #008896 (cor da marca), fixo e sempre visivel */
.site-header{position:fixed;top:0;left:0;width:100%;z-index:3000;
  background:#ffffff;
  border-bottom:1px solid rgba(6,50,55,.1);
  transition:box-shadow .35s var(--ease),border-color .35s}
.site-header.is-scrolled{box-shadow:0 6px 24px rgba(6,50,55,.1);border-bottom-color:rgba(6,50,55,.07)}
.is-scrolled .navbar{padding:9px 0}
.utility-bar{background:rgba(0,36,57,.45);backdrop-filter:blur(6px);border-bottom:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.12)}
.utility-bar__inner{display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;height:38px;font-size:13px;color:#fff}
.utility-nav{display:flex;gap:22px}
.utility-nav a{opacity:.82;transition:opacity .2s}
.utility-nav a:hover,.utility-nav a.is-active{opacity:1}
.utility-contact a{opacity:.82}
.utility-contact a:hover{opacity:1}

.navbar{padding:16px 0}
.navbar__inner{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:24px;padding-inline:var(--pad)}
.brand__logo{height:34px;width:auto}
.main-nav{display:flex;gap:30px;flex:1 1 auto;justify-content:center;align-items:center}
.main-nav a{color:#16282b;font-weight:500;font-size:15px;position:relative;padding:4px 2px;text-align:center;white-space:nowrap}
.main-nav a::after{content:"";position:absolute;left:0;bottom:-2px;width:0;height:2px;background:var(--brand);transition:width .3s var(--ease)}
.main-nav a:hover::after{width:100%}
.nav-cta{display:flex;gap:12px;margin-left:auto}
/* pílulas de uma linha — alinhadas na mesma linha do logo + nav */
.chip{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;gap:8px;height:42px;padding:0 22px;
  border-radius:999px;font-weight:700;font-size:14px;line-height:1;letter-spacing:.01em;
  transition:background .25s,border-color .25s,color .25s,transform .25s var(--ease)}
.chip__arrow{font-size:1.05em;line-height:0;transition:transform .25s var(--ease)}
.chip:hover .chip__arrow{transform:translateX(3px)}
.chip--pet{background:#000;border:1px solid #000;padding:0 18px;min-width:174px}
.chip--pet img{height:34px;width:auto;display:block}
.chip--pet:hover{background:#1c1c1c;border-color:#1c1c1c}
.chip--gold{background:var(--brand);color:#fff;min-width:174px}
.chip--gold:hover{background:var(--brand-deep);color:#fff}
.nav-toggle{display:none;flex-direction:column;gap:5px;padding:8px;margin-left:auto}
.nav-toggle span{width:26px;height:2px;background:#16282b;border-radius:2px;transition:.3s}

/* =========================================================
   HERO
   ========================================================= */
.hero{position:relative;color:var(--ink);padding-top:150px;isolation:isolate}
.hero__media{position:absolute;inset:0;z-index:-2;overflow:hidden}
.hero__media img{width:100%;height:100%;object-fit:cover;object-position:72% 24%;
  transform:scale(1.06);animation:hero-kenburns 18s var(--ease) forwards}
@keyframes hero-kenburns{to{transform:scale(1)}}
.hero__overlay{position:absolute;inset:0;z-index:-1;
  background:linear-gradient(100deg,rgba(255,255,255,.97) 4%,rgba(255,255,255,.88) 30%,rgba(255,255,255,.55) 54%,rgba(255,255,255,.15) 78%,rgba(255,255,255,0) 92%)}
/* scrims p/ legibilidade: topo (header) + base (stats) + aprofundamento à esquerda (headline) */
.hero__glow{position:absolute;inset:0;z-index:-1;pointer-events:none;
  background:
    linear-gradient(to top, rgba(255,255,255,.92) 0%, rgba(255,255,255,.5) 15%, transparent 30%),
    radial-gradient(72% 60% at 2% 40%, rgba(255,255,255,.55), transparent 60%)}
@media (prefers-reduced-motion:reduce){.hero__media img{animation:none;transform:none}}
/* mobile: texto ocupa largura toda sobre a foto → scrim vertical mais forte p/ legibilidade (WCAG) */
@media (max-width:767px){
  .hero__media img{object-position:78% 22%}
  .hero__overlay{background:linear-gradient(180deg,rgba(255,255,255,.94) 0%,rgba(255,255,255,.6) 46%,rgba(255,255,255,.9) 100%)}
  .hero__glow{background:linear-gradient(to top,rgba(255,255,255,.88),transparent 32%)}
}
.hero__inner{position:relative;padding-bottom:clamp(64px,9vw,110px);display:flex;align-items:flex-start;justify-content:space-between}
.hero__content{max-width:600px;padding-top:clamp(20px,4vw,48px)}
.hero__content h1,.hero__content p{text-shadow:none}
.hero__title{font-weight:400;font-size:clamp(46px,9vw,92px);line-height:.98;letter-spacing:-.035em;text-wrap:balance}
.hero__title .accent{color:var(--accent);font-size:.92em;display:inline-block;margin-top:.04em}
.hero__lead{font-size:clamp(20px,3.4vw,30px);margin-top:26px;font-weight:500;letter-spacing:-.012em}
.hero__text{font-size:clamp(15px,2vw,18px);line-height:1.62;margin-top:18px;color:#3f5358;max-width:440px}
.hero .btn--light{margin-top:30px;background:var(--brand);color:var(--dark);box-shadow:0 12px 28px rgba(0,171,191,.3)}
.hero .btn--light:hover{background:var(--brand-deep);color:#fff;box-shadow:0 16px 34px rgba(0,171,191,.36)}
.hero__brandmark{display:none}

/* Stats band */
.stats{position:relative;margin-top:40px;background:linear-gradient(180deg,transparent,rgba(255,255,255,.82) 40%);padding-bottom:44px}
.stats__inner{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(2,1fr);gap:26px 18px}
.stat{display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:6px}
.stat__icon{width:30px;height:30px;color:var(--brand);opacity:.95}
.stat__num{font-weight:700;font-size:clamp(28px,5vw,38px);color:var(--accent);line-height:1;letter-spacing:-.02em}
.stat__label{font-size:13px;font-weight:500;line-height:1.25;color:#2f4145}

/* =========================================================
   ENVIAR RECEITA
   ========================================================= */
.receita{position:relative;overflow:hidden;padding:var(--sy) 0;
  background:
    radial-gradient(120% 75% at -12% -8%, rgba(0,150,160,.12), transparent 42%),
    radial-gradient(95% 95% at 112% 22%, rgba(0,150,160,.09), transparent 46%),
    #ffffff}
.receita__head{text-align:center;position:relative}
.receita__head .eyebrow-thin{font-size:clamp(26px,4.6vw,48px);color:#3a3a3a;letter-spacing:.04em}
.receita__title{font-weight:800;font-size:clamp(36px,8.2vw,80px);line-height:1.02;letter-spacing:-.03em;color:#16201f;margin-top:4px;text-wrap:balance}
.receita__title .hl{color:var(--teal-600)}
.receita__rule{display:block;width:58px;height:3px;background:var(--teal-400);border-radius:2px;margin:20px auto 0;position:relative}
.receita__rule::after{content:"";position:absolute;right:-14px;top:50%;transform:translateY(-50%);width:5px;height:5px;border-radius:50%;background:var(--teal-400)}

.steps{display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;gap:46px;margin:clamp(54px,8vw,84px) auto 0;max-width:340px}
.step{position:relative;width:100%;text-align:center;padding:54px 26px 32px;background:#fff;
  border-radius:20px;border:var(--hair);box-shadow:var(--shadow);
  transition:transform .3s var(--ease),box-shadow .3s var(--ease)}
.step:hover{transform:translateY(-4px);box-shadow:var(--shadow-lg)}
.step__badge{position:absolute;top:0;left:50%;transform:translate(-50%,-50%);
  width:74px;height:74px;border-radius:50%;background:var(--teal-600);color:#fff;
  display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;

  repeating-linear-gradient(to right,var(--teal-400) 0 5px,transparent 5px 11px);

@keyframes dash-flow{to{background-position-x:11px}}
@media (prefers-reduced-motion:reduce){.step-link::before{animation:none}}
.step-chev{position:absolute;top:50%;left:50%;transform:translate(-50%,-50%);

/* =========================================================

.empresas{background:#fff;padding:var(--sy) 0}
.empresas__head{text-align:center;max-width:900px;margin:0 auto}
.empresas .display--center{font-size:clamp(30px,6.5vw,52px)}
.empresas__grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr;gap:38px;margin-top:clamp(40px,6vw,68px)}
.pillar{text-align:center;padding:40px 26px 34px;background:#fff;border:1px solid rgba(0,72,84,.09);border-radius:20px;box-shadow:var(--shadow-sm);display:flex;flex-direction:column;height:100%;transition:transform .3s var(--ease),box-shadow .3s var(--ease)}
.pillar:hover{transform:translateY(-6px);box-shadow:var(--shadow)}
.pillar__badge{width:66px;height:66px;border-radius:50%;
  background:var(--dark);color:#fff;
  display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;margin:0 auto 20px;
  box-shadow:0 0 0 4px #008896,0 14px 30px rgba(0,72,84,.26),inset 0 1px 0 rgba(255,255,255,.22);
  transition:transform .4s var(--ease-spring),box-shadow .3s var(--ease)}
.pillar:hover .pillar__badge{transform:scale(1.07);box-shadow:0 0 0 4px #008896,0 16px 36px rgba(0,72,84,.3),inset 0 1px 0 rgba(255,255,255,.22)}
.pillar__badge svg{width:30px;height:30px;fill:currentColor}
.pillar h3{font-size:15px;font-weight:700;color:var(--brand);letter-spacing:.02em;line-height:1.3}
.pillar p{font-size:14px;color:#444;line-height:1.55;margin-top:12px;max-width:300px;margin-left:auto;margin-right:auto}

/* =========================================================
   DECORAÇÃO — minimal (seções claras)
   Apenas glows teal difusos derivando lentamente + leve
   pontilhado nas bordas. Tons via tokens → respeitam Tweaks.
   ========================================================= */
.empresas,.dif,.blog{position:relative;isolation:isolate}
.empresas>.container,.dif__inner,.blog>.container{position:relative;z-index:2}

/* malha de pontos sutil, com fade nas bordas */
.empresas::before,.dif::before,.blog::before{
  content:"";position:absolute;inset:0;z-index:0;pointer-events:none;
  background-image:radial-gradient(color-mix(in srgb,var(--brand) 30%,transparent) 1px,transparent 1.2px);
  background-size:34px 34px;background-position:0 0;
  opacity:.08;
  -webkit-mask-image:radial-gradient(125% 100% at 50% 0%,#000 30%,transparent 72%);
          mask-image:radial-gradient(125% 100% at 50% 0%,#000 30%,transparent 72%)}

/* camada de glows */
.sec-fx{position:absolute;inset:0;z-index:1;pointer-events:none;overflow:hidden}
@media (prefers-reduced-motion:reduce){.sec-fx *{animation:none!important}}

/* glow teal difuso que deriva lentamente */
.fx-blob{position:absolute;border-radius:50%;
  background:radial-gradient(circle at 50% 50%,color-mix(in srgb,var(--brand) 16%,transparent),transparent 70%);
  filter:blur(10px);will-change:transform}

@keyframes fxDriftA{0%,100%{transform:translate3d(0,0,0)}50%{transform:translate3d(30px,-26px,0)}}
@keyframes fxDriftB{0%,100%{transform:translate3d(0,0,0)}50%{transform:translate3d(-26px,22px,0)}}

/* === posicionamento por seção === */
.empresas .fx-blob--1{width:380px;height:380px;top:-120px;left:-130px;animation:fxDriftA 24s var(--ease) infinite}
.empresas .fx-blob--2{width:320px;height:320px;bottom:-150px;right:-110px;animation:fxDriftB 28s var(--ease) infinite}
.dif .fx-blob--1{width:360px;height:360px;top:-110px;right:-120px;animation:fxDriftB 26s var(--ease) infinite}
.dif .fx-blob--2{width:300px;height:300px;bottom:-140px;left:-110px;animation:fxDriftA 30s var(--ease) infinite}
.blog .fx-blob--1{width:340px;height:340px;top:-100px;left:-110px;animation:fxDriftA 27s var(--ease) infinite}
.blog .fx-blob--2{width:340px;height:340px;bottom:-150px;right:-120px;animation:fxDriftB 23s var(--ease) infinite}

@media (max-width:767px){
  .empresas::before,.dif::before,.blog::before{opacity:.06}
}

/* =========================================================
   NOSSOS DIFERENCIAIS
   ========================================================= */
.dif{background:#f4f8f8;padding:var(--sy) 0}
.dif__inner{display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:clamp(34px,5vw,48px)}
.dif__head{max-width:560px}
.dif__eyebrow{font-weight:300;font-size:clamp(20px,3.4vw,28px);color:var(--teal-350);letter-spacing:.06em}
.dif__title{font-weight:500;font-size:clamp(34px,6.5vw,56px);line-height:1.06;color:var(--teal-650);margin-top:4px;letter-spacing:-.02em;text-wrap:balance}
.dif__rule{display:block;width:54px;height:4px;border-radius:2px;background:var(--teal-350);margin:18px 0}
.dif__sub{font-weight:400;font-size:clamp(15px,2.2vw,18px);line-height:1.6;color:var(--muted);max-width:420px}

/* =========================================================
   DIFERENCIAIS — V2 (em volta do pote de cápsulas)
   ========================================================= */
.dif2{background:#f4f8f8;padding:var(--sy) 0;position:relative;isolation:isolate;overflow:hidden}
.dif2>.container{position:relative;z-index:2}
.dif2__head{text-align:center;max-width:640px;margin:0 auto clamp(34px,5vw,58px)}
.dif2__head .dif__eyebrow{display:block;text-align:center}
.dif2__head .dif__title{font-size:clamp(34px,6vw,54px);margin-top:2px}
.dif2__head .dif__rule{margin:18px auto 0}
.dif2__head .dif__sub{max-width:520px;margin:18px auto 0;text-align:center}

.dif2__layout{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr clamp(168px,17vw,250px) 1fr;
  align-items:center;gap:clamp(18px,2.6vw,40px);position:relative}
/* fios do infográfico — convergem para o centro do pote, ocultos atrás dele */
.dif2__wires{position:absolute;inset:0;width:100%;height:100%;pointer-events:none;z-index:1;overflow:visible}
.dif2__wires path{fill:none;stroke:color-mix(in srgb,var(--brand) 42%,transparent);stroke-width:1.5;
  stroke-linecap:round;stroke-linejoin:round}
.dif2__wires circle{fill:var(--brand)}
.dif2__col{display:flex;flex-direction:column;justify-content:center;gap:clamp(26px,3.4vw,44px);position:relative;z-index:2}
.dif2 .fx-blob--1{width:320px;height:320px;top:-100px;left:-120px;animation:fxDriftA 26s var(--ease) infinite}
.dif2 .fx-blob--2{width:300px;height:300px;bottom:-130px;right:-110px;animation:fxDriftB 24s var(--ease) infinite}
.dif2__col--left{align-items:flex-end;text-align:right}
.dif2__col--right{align-items:flex-start;text-align:left}

.dif2__bottle{position:relative;display:flex;justify-content:center;align-items:flex-end;z-index:3}
.dif2__bottle::after{content:"";position:absolute;left:50%;bottom:2%;width:62%;height:26px;
  transform:translateX(-50%);border-radius:50%;background:rgba(0,40,48,.22);filter:blur(14px);z-index:-1}
.dif2__bottle img{width:100%;max-width:250px;height:auto;
  filter:drop-shadow(0 26px 44px rgba(0,40,48,.26));
  animation:dif2BottleFloat 6.5s var(--ease) infinite}
@keyframes dif2BottleFloat{0%,100%{transform:translateY(0)}50%{transform:translateY(-12px)}}
@media (prefers-reduced-motion:reduce){.dif2__bottle img{animation:none}}

.dif2feat{max-width:230px;display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:8px;position:relative;
  transition:transform .35s var(--ease)}
.dif2__col--left .dif2feat{align-items:flex-end}
.dif2__col--right .dif2feat{align-items:flex-start}
.dif2feat:hover{transform:translateY(-4px)}
.dif2feat__icon{width:32px;height:32px;color:var(--teal-350);
  transition:transform .4s var(--ease-spring),color .3s var(--ease)}
.dif2feat:hover .dif2feat__icon{transform:scale(1.12);color:var(--brand)}
.dif2feat__icon svg{width:100%;height:100%}
.dif2feat h3{font-size:14.5px;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:.03em;line-height:1.32;color:var(--teal-650)}
.dif2feat p{font-size:13px;font-weight:400;line-height:1.56;color:var(--muted)}

@media (max-width:860px){
  .dif2__layout{grid-template-columns:1fr;gap:0}
  .dif2__bottle{order:-1;margin-bottom:clamp(28px,6vw,40px)}
  .dif2__bottle img{max-width:230px}
  .dif2__col{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:30px 22px}
  .dif2__col--left,.dif2__col--right{align-items:start;text-align:left}
  .dif2__col--left .dif2feat,.dif2__col--right .dif2feat{align-items:flex-start;max-width:none}
  .dif2__wires{display:none}
}
@media (max-width:430px){
  .dif2__col{grid-template-columns:1fr}
}
.dif__figure{position:relative;margin:26px 0 0;border-radius:20px;overflow:hidden;box-shadow:var(--shadow-lg)}
.dif__figure img{display:block;width:100%;height:clamp(280px,60vw,380px);object-fit:cover;object-position:center;
  transition:transform .8s var(--ease)}
.dif__figure:hover img{transform:scale(1.035)}
.dif__figcap{position:absolute;left:16px;bottom:14px;z-index:2;color:#fff;font-size:12px;font-weight:600;
  letter-spacing:.08em;text-transform:uppercase;padding:7px 14px;border-radius:999px;
  background:rgba(0,40,48,.42);backdrop-filter:blur(6px);-webkit-backdrop-filter:blur(6px)}
.dif__grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr;gap:20px;grid-auto-rows:1fr}
.dcard{position:relative;height:100%;background:#fff;border-radius:20px;border:1px solid rgba(0,72,84,.09);padding:34px 24px 30px;text-align:center;
  display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;justify-content:center;box-shadow:var(--shadow-sm);
  transition:transform .42s var(--ease),box-shadow .42s var(--ease),background .3s var(--ease),border-color .3s var(--ease),opacity .45s var(--ease)}
.dcard:hover{transform:translateY(-8px) scale(1.12);z-index:5;background:var(--brand);border-color:var(--brand);box-shadow:0 26px 60px rgba(0,72,84,.32)}
.dcard:hover h3{color:#fff}
.dcard:hover p{color:rgba(255,255,255,.92)}
.dcard__icon{width:60px;height:60px;border:1.5px solid rgba(0,112,116,.3);background:rgba(0,112,116,.05);border-radius:50%;
  display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;color:var(--teal-350);margin-bottom:18px;flex:0 0 auto;
  transition:background .3s var(--ease),color .3s var(--ease),transform .4s var(--ease-spring)}
.dcard:hover .dcard__icon{background:#fff;color:var(--brand);border-color:#fff;transform:scale(1.08);box-shadow:0 0 0 5px rgba(255,255,255,.22),0 10px 22px rgba(0,0,0,.16)}
.dcard__icon svg{width:28px;height:28px}
.dcard__icon{box-shadow:0 0 0 5px rgba(0,136,150,.07),0 8px 18px rgba(0,72,84,.1)}
.dcard__num{font-weight:800;font-size:19px;color:var(--teal-350);letter-spacing:.02em}
.dcard h3{font-size:14.5px;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:.03em;line-height:1.4;color:var(--teal-650);margin-top:2px}
.dcard p{font-size:13px;font-weight:400;line-height:1.6;color:var(--muted);margin-top:10px}
.dcard.is-swapping{opacity:0;transform:translateY(12px) scale(.97)}

/* =========================================================
   BLOG
   ========================================================= */
.blog{background:var(--paper);padding:var(--sy) 0}
.blog__head{text-align:center;max-width:560px;margin:0 auto}
.eyebrow-thin--teal{font-size:15px;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:.12em;color:var(--teal-350)}
.blog__title{font-weight:700;font-size:clamp(34px,6vw,50px);color:var(--teal-850);margin-top:14px;letter-spacing:-.025em;text-wrap:balance}
.blog__sub{font-size:16px;color:var(--muted);margin-top:14px;line-height:1.5}
/* Galeria circular WebGL (OGL) */
.blog__gallery{position:relative;width:100vw;margin-left:calc(50% - 50vw);height:clamp(400px,52vw,560px);margin-top:clamp(32px,5vw,52px);
  color:var(--teal-650);font-weight:700;font-size:24px;cursor:grab;touch-action:pan-y;overflow:hidden}
.blog__gallery:active{cursor:grabbing}
.blog__gallery canvas{display:block;width:100%!important;height:100%!important}
/* fallback estático (file://, sem WebGL) — escondido quando a galeria 3D sobe */
.blog__gallery.is-live .blog__fallback{display:none}
.blog__fallback{display:flex;gap:18px;height:100%;align-items:center;overflow-x:auto;
  padding:6px 2px;scroll-snap-type:x mandatory;scrollbar-width:none;-ms-overflow-style:none}
.blog__fallback::-webkit-scrollbar{display:none}
.fcard{position:relative;flex:0 0 auto;width:clamp(230px,44vw,310px);aspect-ratio:3/4;
  border-radius:var(--radius-lg);overflow:hidden;box-shadow:var(--shadow);scroll-snap-align:center;
  transition:transform .4s var(--ease),box-shadow .4s var(--ease)}
.fcard:hover{transform:translateY(-8px);box-shadow:var(--shadow-lg)}
.fcard img{width:100%;height:100%;object-fit:cover;transition:transform .7s var(--ease)}
.fcard:hover img{transform:scale(1.06)}
.fcard__t{position:absolute;left:0;right:0;bottom:0;padding:30px 18px 16px;color:#fff;font-weight:700;
  font-size:15px;line-height:1.3;background:linear-gradient(transparent,rgba(0,36,57,.88))}
.blog__hint{text-align:center;font-size:12px;letter-spacing:.1em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--muted);margin-top:16px}
.blog__cta{display:flex;justify-content:center;margin-top:26px}

/* ===== Carrossel circular (CSS transforms — roda em file:// e http) ===== */
.blog__gallery.cgal-ready{background:transparent;overflow:hidden;cursor:grab;user-select:none;-webkit-user-select:none;touch-action:pan-y}
.blog__gallery.cgal-ready:active{cursor:grabbing}
.blog__gallery.cgal-ready .blog__fallback{display:none}
.cgal__stage{position:absolute;inset:0}
.cgal__card{position:absolute;left:50%;top:50%;width:var(--cgal-cw,300px);transform:translate(-50%,-50%);
  will-change:transform,opacity;text-decoration:none}
.cgal__card figure{margin:0}
.cgal__media{display:block;position:relative;width:100%;aspect-ratio:3/4;border-radius:18px;overflow:hidden;
  box-shadow:0 24px 50px rgba(0,40,48,.18),0 0 0 1px rgba(0,40,48,.05)}
.cgal__media img{width:100%;height:100%;object-fit:cover;pointer-events:none}
.cgal__cap{margin-top:15px;text-align:center;color:var(--teal-850);font-weight:700;letter-spacing:-.01em;
  font-size:clamp(14px,1.3vw,17px)}
.cgal__nav{position:absolute;top:50%;transform:translate(-50%,-50%);z-index:2000;
  width:52px;height:52px;border-radius:50%;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;
  background:#fff;border:1px solid var(--line);color:var(--brand);box-shadow:var(--shadow);
  font-size:26px;line-height:0;padding-bottom:3px;
  transition:background .25s var(--ease),transform .25s var(--ease),color .25s}
.cgal__nav:hover{background:var(--brand);color:#fff;transform:translate(-50%,-50%) scale(1.08)}
.cgal__nav:active{transform:translate(-50%,-50%) scale(.96)}
.cgal__nav--prev{left:calc(50% - clamp(160px,23vw,250px))}
.cgal__nav--next{left:calc(50% + clamp(160px,23vw,250px));right:auto}
@media (prefers-reduced-motion:reduce){.cgal__card{transition:none}}

.blog__carousel{position:relative;margin-top:clamp(36px,5vw,56px)}
.blog__track{display:flex;gap:22px;overflow-x:auto;scroll-snap-type:x mandatory;
  padding:8px 4px 24px;scroll-behavior:smooth;-ms-overflow-style:none;scrollbar-width:none}
.blog__track::-webkit-scrollbar{display:none}
.post{flex:0 0 78%;max-width:300px;scroll-snap-align:center;background:#fff;border-radius:var(--radius-lg);
  overflow:hidden;box-shadow:var(--shadow-sm);transition:transform .35s var(--ease),box-shadow .35s var(--ease)}

.post h3{font-size:17px;font-weight:700;color:var(--teal-850);line-height:1.3;margin-top:10px}
.post__excerpt{font-size:13.5px;color:var(--muted);line-height:1.5;margin-top:10px}
.post__link{display:inline-block;margin-top:14px;font-weight:700;font-size:13.5px;color:var(--teal-350)}
.post__link:hover{color:var(--teal-700)}
.carousel-btn{position:absolute;top:38%;width:46px;height:46px;border-radius:50%;background:#fff;
  box-shadow:var(--shadow);color:var(--teal-500);font-size:26px;line-height:1;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;
  transition:transform .25s,background .25s;z-index:2}
.carousel-btn:hover{background:var(--teal-500);color:#fff;transform:scale(1.08)}
.carousel-btn--prev{left:-6px}
.carousel-btn--next{right:-6px}

/* =========================================================
   NEWSLETTER
   ========================================================= */

.news__form .btn--solid{background:var(--brand);color:var(--dark);padding:16px 30px}
.news__form .btn--solid:hover{background:var(--brand-deep);color:#fff}
.news__note{font-size:14px;color:var(--muted);margin-top:14px}
.news__right{background:#fff;border-radius:24px;padding:clamp(26px,4vw,42px);box-shadow:0 32px 72px rgba(0,18,26,.42);color:var(--ink)}
.news__formtitle{color:var(--teal-800)}
.news__formsub{color:var(--muted)}
.news__form input{border:1.5px solid var(--line)}
.news__form input:focus{border-color:var(--brand);box-shadow:0 0 0 4px rgba(0,136,150,.16)}
@media(min-width:880px){
  .news__inner{flex-direction:row;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;gap:clamp(28px,3.2vw,48px)}
  .news__left{flex:1 1 auto;max-width:520px}
  .news__right{flex:0 0 clamp(380px,38%,460px)}
}

/* =========================================================
   FOOTER
   ========================================================= */
.footer{background:#e8eaea;color:#111;position:relative}
.footer__inner{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr;gap:38px;padding-top:clamp(48px,7vw,76px);padding-bottom:44px}
.footer__logo{height:42px;width:auto;margin-bottom:18px}
.footer__brand p{font-size:16px;line-height:1.5;color:#111;max-width:300px}
.footer__franq{display:inline-block;margin-top:18px;color:#008896;font-weight:700;font-size:15px}
.footer__col h4{font-size:15px;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:.06em;color:#16282b;margin-bottom:18px}
.footer__col a{display:block;color:#111;font-size:15px;opacity:.9;margin-bottom:12px;
  transition:opacity .2s,color .2s,transform .2s var(--ease)}
.footer__col a.is-gold{color:#008896;opacity:1}
.footer__franq{transition:transform .2s var(--ease),color .2s}
/* feedback de toque (mobile) */
.footer__col a:active,.footer__franq:active{opacity:1;color:#008896}
/* hover só em hardware com ponteiro fino (mouse/trackpad) — toque usa :active */
@media (hover:hover) and (pointer:fine){
  .footer__col a:hover{opacity:1;color:#008896;transform:translateX(4px)}
  .footer__franq:hover{transform:translateX(4px)}
}
.footer__social{display:flex;gap:12px}
.footer__social a{width:42px;height:42px;color:#16282b;border:1px solid rgba(0,40,48,.28);border-radius:50%;
  display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;opacity:1;margin:0;transition:background .25s,border-color .25s,color .25s}
.footer__social a:hover{background:#008896;border-color:#008896;color:#fff}
.footer__social svg{width:20px;height:20px}
.footer__bar{border-top:1px solid rgba(0,0,0,.12)}
.footer__bar-inner{display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:10px;padding-top:24px;padding-bottom:24px;
  font-size:13px;color:#444;line-height:1.5}
.footer__by strong{color:#16282b}
.footer__tagline{background:#000c11;padding:14px 0;padding-bottom:max(14px,env(safe-area-inset-bottom))}
.footer__tagline .container{display:flex;gap:14px;justify-content:center;align-items:center;flex-wrap:wrap;
  color:var(--accent-bright);font-size:clamp(16px,3vw,22px)}
.footer__tagline .dot{opacity:.6}

/* =========================================================
   BREAKPOINTS  (mobile-first → up)
   ========================================================= */
@media (min-width:640px){
  .stats__inner{grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr)}
  .receita__cta{flex-direction:row;justify-content:center}
  .dif__grid{grid-template-columns:repeat(2,1fr)}
  .empresas__grid{grid-template-columns:repeat(2,1fr)}
  .post{flex-basis:46%}
  .news__form{flex-direction:row;align-items:center}
  .footer__inner{grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:34px 40px}
  .footer__bar-inner{flex-direction:row;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center}
}

@media (min-width:768px){
  .steps{flex-direction:row;align-items:stretch;max-width:none;gap:0}
  .step{flex:1 1 0;max-width:320px}
  .step-link{display:block}
}

@media (min-width:1024px){
  .stats__inner{grid-template-columns:repeat(5,1fr);gap:24px}
  .empresas__grid{grid-template-columns:repeat(4,1fr);gap:clamp(30px,3vw,42px)}
  .dif__inner{flex-direction:row;align-items:stretch}
  .dif__head{flex:0 0 360px;display:flex;flex-direction:column}
  .dif__grid{grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr);flex:1}
  .dif__figure{margin-top:30px;border-radius:18px;flex:1 1 0;min-height:0}
  .dif__figure img{height:100%;width:100%;object-fit:cover}
  .dif__figure::after{content:"";position:absolute;inset:0;pointer-events:none;
    background:none}
  .post{flex-basis:30%;max-width:280px}
  .footer__inner{grid-template-columns:2fr 1fr 1fr 1.4fr;gap:44px}
}

@media (min-width:992px){
  .anos__overlay{min-height:clamp(460px,40vw,560px);justify-content:center}
  .anos__content{max-width:50%}
  .anos__media{inset:0;width:114%;left:0;right:auto}
  .anos__img{height:100%;object-position:50% center}
  /* fade suave da borda esquerda da imagem para o fundo claro (sem costura dura) */
  .anos__media::before{content:"";position:absolute;inset:0;z-index:1;pointer-events:none;
    background:linear-gradient(100deg,rgba(238,244,244,.97) 0%,rgba(238,244,244,.85) 26%,rgba(238,244,244,.3) 42%,transparent 56%)}
}

@media (min-width:1200px){
  .hero{padding-top:170px}
  .hero__brandmark{display:block;font-family:var(--serif);font-style:italic;font-weight:500;
    font-size:120px;color:rgba(255,255,255,.16);line-height:1;align-self:center;margin-top:40px;white-space:nowrap}
}

/* ---------- Mobile nav ---------- */
@media (max-width:1023px){
  .utility-bar{display:none}
  .main-nav,.nav-cta{position:fixed;top:0;right:-100%;width:min(82vw,360px);height:100vh;
    background:linear-gradient(160deg,var(--teal-900),#001a20);flex-direction:column;
    padding:100px 32px 32px;gap:20px;align-items:flex-start;justify-content:flex-start;flex:0 0 auto;transition:right .4s var(--ease);z-index:60;box-shadow:-20px 0 60px rgba(0,0,0,.4)}
  .nav-cta{top:auto;bottom:0;height:auto;right:-100%;padding:0 32px 40px;background:transparent;box-shadow:none;position:fixed;
    width:min(82vw,360px)}
  body.nav-open .main-nav,body.nav-open .nav-cta{right:0}
  .nav-cta{justify-content:flex-start}
  .chip{width:100%}
  .nav-toggle{display:flex;z-index:70}
  body.nav-open .nav-toggle span:nth-child(1){transform:translateY(7px) rotate(45deg)}
  body.nav-open .nav-toggle span:nth-child(2){opacity:0}
  body.nav-open .nav-toggle span:nth-child(3){transform:translateY(-7px) rotate(-45deg)}
  .main-nav a{font-size:20px;color:#fff;padding:8px 2px}
  body.nav-open .nav-toggle span{background:#fff}
  .nav-cta .chip--pet{color:#fff;border-color:rgba(255,255,255,.4)}
}


/* =========================================================
   MOBILE-FIRST POLISH  (≤767 phones · ≤480 small phones)
   Refina densidade, toque e legibilidade no mobile —
   não altera o stacking/estrutura já existentes.
   ========================================================= */
@media (max-width:767px){
  /* texto corrido flui (remove quebras forçadas que ficam ruins no estreito) */
  .hero__text br,.blog__sub br,.news__copy br,.empresas .display br,.anos__text br{display:none}

  /* HERO — mobile: FOTO no topo, texto limpo embaixo (sem sobreposição) */
  .hero{padding-top:64px;background:#fff;isolation:isolate}
  .hero__media{position:relative;inset:auto;height:auto;z-index:0;overflow:hidden}
  .hero__media img{position:relative;width:100%;height:auto;aspect-ratio:3/2.5;object-fit:cover;
    object-position:74% 16%;animation:none;transform:none}
  /* fade suave da base da foto para o creme — transição sem costura */
  .hero__media::after{content:"";position:absolute;left:0;right:0;bottom:-1px;height:96px;z-index:1;
    pointer-events:none;background:linear-gradient(180deg,transparent,#fff)}
  .hero__overlay,.hero__glow{display:none}
  .hero__inner{position:relative;z-index:2;display:block;padding-top:22px;padding-bottom:clamp(36px,9vw,52px)}
  .hero__content{padding-top:0;max-width:none}
  .hero__title{font-size:clamp(42px,11.5vw,62px);line-height:1}
  .hero__lead{font-size:clamp(19px,5.4vw,24px);margin-top:16px}
  .hero__text{font-size:16px;line-height:1.6;margin-top:14px;max-width:none}
  .hero__brandmark{display:none}

  /* HEADER — logo proporcional, área de toque do menu maior */
  .brand__logo{height:30px}
  .navbar{padding:13px 0}
  .is-scrolled .navbar{padding:8px 0}
  .nav-toggle{padding:10px;margin:-2px -6px -2px auto}
  .nav-cta{gap:14px}
  .nav-cta .chip{height:48px}

  /* PILARES / EMPRESAS — 2 colunas no mobile (teste), cartões enxutos */
  .empresas .display--center{font-size:clamp(27px,7.2vw,40px)}
  .empresas__grid{grid-template-columns:repeat(2,1fr);gap:14px}
  .pillar{padding:26px 16px 24px}
  .pillar__badge{width:52px;height:52px;margin-bottom:14px}
  .pillar h3{font-size:14px}
  .pillar p{font-size:13px;max-width:none}

  /* ANOS — masterpiece mobile: texto centralizado no creme + foto enquadrada embaixo */
  .anos{background:#fff}
  .anos__overlay{position:relative;z-index:2;min-height:0;padding:clamp(44px,11vw,64px) 0 clamp(26px,7vw,38px);
    display:block;text-align:center}
  .anos__content{max-width:none;margin:0 auto}
  .anos__text{margin-left:auto;margin-right:auto;max-width:none}
  .anos__title{font-size:clamp(30px,8.4vw,42px)}
  .anos .btn--ghost-teal{margin-top:20px}
  .anos__media{position:relative;inset:auto;height:auto;aspect-ratio:4/3;
    margin:0 clamp(16px,4vw,28px) clamp(44px,9vw,60px);border-radius:20px;overflow:hidden;box-shadow:var(--shadow)}
  .anos__media::before{display:none}
  .anos__img{position:absolute;inset:0;width:100%;height:100%!important;object-fit:cover;
    object-position:54% center;transform:none!important}

  /* DIFERENCIAIS V2 — frasco menor sobra espaço às features */
  .dif2__bottle img{max-width:188px}
  .dif2__head{margin-bottom:clamp(26px,7vw,38px)}

  /* NEWSLETTER — título e card proporcionais ao telefone */
  .news__title{font-size:clamp(52px,15vw,80px)}
  .news__right{padding:24px 22px;border-radius:20px}

  /* FOOTER — alvos de toque confortáveis (≥44px) */
  .footer__col a{padding:9px 0;margin-bottom:2px}
  .footer__col h4{margin-bottom:8px}
  .footer__social{gap:14px}
  .footer__social a{width:46px;height:46px}

  /* TWEAKS — FAB e painel não cobrem conteúdo e respeitam safe-area */
  .tw-fab{right:14px;bottom:calc(14px + env(safe-area-inset-bottom))}
  .tw-panel{right:10px;left:10px;width:auto;max-width:none;
    bottom:calc(14px + env(safe-area-inset-bottom))}
}

@media (max-width:860px){
  /* Diferenciais: os 6 itens num único grid 2 × 3 (sem item órfão) */
  .dif2__layout{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:clamp(26px,5vw,38px) clamp(16px,4vw,28px)}
  .dif2__bottle{order:-1;grid-column:1 / -1}
  .dif2__col--left,.dif2__col--right{display:contents}
  .dif2feat{align-items:flex-start;text-align:left;max-width:none}
}
@media (max-width:480px){
  .dif2__layout{gap:24px 14px}
  .dif2feat h3{font-size:13.5px}
  .dif2feat p{font-size:12.5px}
}

<style id="contact-css">

.contact__hero .container{position:relative;z-index:1}
.contact__eyebrow{font-size:13px;letter-spacing:.16em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--accent-bright,#4FB6C0);font-weight:700;margin-bottom:14px}

.contact__form h2{font-size:clamp(22px,2.6vw,28px);font-weight:700;color:var(--teal-850,#06343a);margin:0 0 6px}

.field-row{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:16px}

  align-items:center;justify-content:center;color:var(--teal-800,#0a3f45);transition:background .2s,color .2s,border-color .2s}

.contact__social svg{width:16px;height:16px}
@media(max-width:820px){
  .contact__grid{grid-template-columns:1fr;padding-top:clamp(36px,7vw,56px)}

}
.main-nav a[aria-current]::after{width:100%}
